_meta.purpose: Explicit mapping for the dest index of transform 'dev-example-project-game-user-cohort'. Pinning active_dates as keyword (not date) is required so the Kibana data view runtime fields d1_live..d30_live can do String == String comparison. Without this, the transform falls back to dynamic mapping and infers active_dates as date from the ISO-date strings it emits, which breaks every retention runtime field (always emits 0).
